description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with pouch and graphic print on the front FittingRegular Wash Care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Curiosity may have killed the cat but it definitely got the kitten into some pretty big adventures. Look as cute and frisky as a kitten in this yellow tee from jealous 21. Team it with white shorts or skinny jeans for an outing with friends and look hot all the way. Carry it in the cute pouch for quick weekend getaways or sleepovers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
